com.mentor.chs.api

Class CSVGParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mentor.chs.api.CSVGParameters

  • @NotToBeImplemented
public class CSVGParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    This class allows the user to programtically specify some parameters to the non-Legacy (CSVG) mechanism without the need to modify chs_home\config\svgprops.xml. The order of precedence is:

    ppi

    width and height

    So if PPI is greater than zero then this parameter will be used, else width and height will be used.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      boolean fitToBorder
      This parameter specifies if the output image will be scaled to fit to the border or otherwise the full diagram extent.
      int height
      An absolute height for the output image - this is ignored if PPI is set.
      java.util.Collection<XImageFormat> imageCodings
      Possible encodings that may be used with pictures that are embedded inside the SVG.
      int ppi
      This parameter specifies the Points Per Inch.
      int width
      An absolute width for the output image - this is ignored if PPI is set.

      Constructors

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • ppi

        public int ppi
        This parameter specifies the Points Per Inch. Thus a symbol that is 2 inches wide and high, if a PPI of 72 is passed in then the outputed image will be 144 x 144 pixels in size.

      • width

        public int width
        An absolute width for the output image - this is ignored if PPI is set. If ppi is a zero/negative value and the width has a zero/negative value then the value from chs_home\config\svgprops.xml will be used.

      • height

        public int height
        An absolute height for the output image - this is ignored if PPI is set. If ppi is a zero/negative value and the height has a zero/negative value then the value from chs_home\config\svgprops.xml will be used.

      • imageCodings

        public java.util.Collection<XImageFormat> imageCodings
        Possible encodings that may be used with pictures that are embedded inside the SVG. For example {gif, jpg, png, ...} The CSVG mechanism will examine each embedded picture and selects the best encoding to use from the given collection. If imageCodings is null or empty then the values from chs_home\config\svgprops.xml will be used.

      • fitToBorder

        public boolean fitToBorder
        This parameter specifies if the output image will be scaled to fit to the border or otherwise the full diagram extent.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CSVGParameters

        public CSVGParameters()
